title: Property CRUD Operations
description: Verify that create, read, update, and delete operations for properties work correctly with valid inputs, including validation and database persistence.

steps.description: Navigate to the property management page.
Create a new property with valid attributes including address, price, type, and descriptions.
Confirm the property is saved and displayed in the listing with correct details.
Read the property details from both the modal view and dedicated detail page.
Property details match the initially entered data in all views.
Update certain property details (e.g. price, description) using the modal edit interface.
Changes persist and are accurately reflected in all property views.
Delete the property via modal delete confirmation.
Property is removed from listings and database.

title: Property Advanced Filtering and Search
description: Test multi-criteria filtering and search of properties including filters on price range, location, property type, and agent.

steps.description: Navigate to property listing page.
Apply a price range filter that matches some properties.
Only properties within the price range are displayed.
Apply location and property type filters simultaneously.
Results match all selected criteria.
Search by keywords in property descriptions.
Properties containing keywords in description or title appear.
Test empty or no-match filter scenario.
Page shows appropriate 'no results' message and handles gracefully.

title: Agent Profile Management and Performance Tracking
description: Verify management of agent profiles including creation, update, deletion, and display of performance metrics.

steps.description: Navigate to agent management page.
Create new agent profile with required information.
Agent appears in listings with correct details.
Update agent specialization and commission data.
Updated agent info persists and displays correctly.
Check agent performance metrics shown on profile.
Performance data matches backend records and updates with relevant deals.
Delete an agent and confirm removal.
Agent is removed safely without orphan data.

title: Customer CRM: Preference and Budget Tracking
description: Validate customer management including adding preferences, budget tracking, and managing lead statuses.

steps.description: Access the customer management interface.
Add a new customer with personal and contact details.
Customer appears in list with correct data.
Add or update customer property preferences and budget.
Preferences and budget values are saved and reflected correctly.
Change customer lead status through predefined states.
Lead status updates persist and trigger appropriate system behaviors.
Attempt to create customer with missing required fields.
Validation errors are shown preventing incomplete entry.

title: Deal Pipeline and Commission Calculation
description: Check deal management workflows including creating deals, moving through stages, and automatic commission calculation.

steps.description: Open the deal pipeline interface.
Create a new deal linked to a customer, property, and agent.
Deal is displayed in initial pipeline stage with correct data.
Update deal status through stages (e.g., negotiation, closed).
Deal moves correctly through pipeline stages.
Verify automatic commission amount calculation based on deal value and agent rates.
Commission is correct and shown in deal details.
Test deal deletion and system consistency.
Deal removed without impacting related entities erroneously.

title: Task Management: Assignment and Status Tracking
description: Validate creation, assignment, prioritization, and status updates of tasks assigned to agents.

steps.description: Navigate to task management page.
Create a new task with description, priority, assignee, and due date.
Task appears with correct details and assigned agent.
Update task status to 'in progress' and then 'completed'.
Status updates reflect on UI and trigger relevant notifications.
Delete a task and verify removal.
Task is no longer listed and data is cleaned.

title: AI-Powered Property Recommendations with Fallback
description: Ensure AI-powered recommendations return relevant properties, provide reasoning explanation, and gracefully fallback if Gemini API fails.

steps.description: Login as user with defined preferences.
Access AI-powered recommendation page to fetch matches.
Recommendations are relevant to customer preferences and include reasoning explanations.
Simulate Gemini API failure.
System falls back to default recommendation logic and informs user appropriately.

title: Dashboard and Analytics Real-time Updates
description: Test that dashboard displays up-to-date statistics and recent activity summaries accurately and updates in real time.

steps.description: Login and navigate to the dashboard.
Perform property,deal, task creations and updates in other interfaces.
Dashboard statistics and activity feeds reflect changes within expected real-time delay.

title: Modal-Based CRUD Interface Consistency
description: Verify CRUD operations on all entities work correctly within modals and interact seamlessly with page data.

steps.description: Open create modal for property, agent, customer, deal, and task entities.
Perform valid create, edit, read and delete via modals.
Changes persist and UI updates without full page reload.
Attempt invalid data entry in modals.
Validation errors appear inline and prevent submission.

title: Security Validations: CSRF, XSS, Session
description: Ensure all forms enforce CSRF tokens, inputs are sanitized to prevent XSS, and sessions are managed securely.

steps.description: Submit forms with missing or invalid CSRF tokens.
Submissions are rejected with proper error messages.
Input malicious scripts in form fields.
Inputs are sanitized; scripts do not execute on output.
Verify secure flags on session cookies and session expiration behavior.
Sessions behave securely avoiding fixation and hijacking.

title: Responsive UI Verification on Mobile and Desktop
description: Check that the UI layout and features render correctly and are usable on various desktop and mobile screen sizes.

steps.description: Open the application on multiple browser viewport widths including mobile (320px+) and desktop.
All pages render correctly without layout breakage.
Test interactive elements such as modals, dropdowns, and forms on touch and pointer devices.
All UI interactions function smoothly and consistently.

title: Environment Configuration Management Security and Audit
description: Validate secure management of dynamic environment variables via admin UI with proper audit trail logging.

steps.description: Login as admin user and navigate to environment configuration page.
Create, update, and delete environment variables.
Changes are applied correctly and only visible to authorized users.
Review audit logs for environment changes.
All changes are logged with user and timestamp for traceability.

title: Report Generation and Export Functionality
description: Test generating reports for properties, deals, and recommendations with export to PDF, Excel, and JSON formats.

steps.description: Navigate to report generation section.
Generate reports for properties, deals, and AI recommendations.
Reports display accurate data matching current system state.
Export reports to PDF, Excel, and JSON formats.
Exports download successfully and files contents are valid and complete.

title: In-app Notification System Delivery and Display
description: Validate that system-generated notifications are delivered to users and displayed properly in-app.

steps.description: Trigger system events that generate notifications (e.g., deal stage change, task assignment).
Notifications appear promptly in user notification UI.
Open notifications panel and mark notifications as read.
Notifications status updates persist and count reflects unread accurately.

title: Background Job Scheduling and Execution
description: Verify that scheduled background jobs run at correct intervals and perform data refreshes and processing tasks.

steps.description: Configure background job schedules for AI matching refresh and task automation.
Monitor job execution and system state before and after jobs run.
Jobs complete successfully, trigger expected data updates, and error handling logs failures.

title: Error Handling and Database Transaction Rollbacks
description: Test system robustness by provoking error scenarios ensuring proper rollback and meaningful error responses.

steps.description: Force an error during property creation (e.g., database constraint violation).
System rolls back transaction, no partial data saved, and returns appropriate error to user.
Trigger server error during agent update and verify error page or JSON response.
User sees informative error message; server logs capture error details.

title: Property Sharing and Social Media Integration
description: Validate property sharing capabilities including URL copying and integration with common social media platforms.

steps.description: Open a property detail page.
Use property sharing buttons to copy URL and share on social media.
URL is copied to clipboard successfully and social media share dialogs open with correct link.
